CVE-2017-17535.title: lib/gui.py in Bob Hepple gjots2 2.4.1 does not validate strings b ...
CVE-2017-17535.description: lib/gui.py in Bob Hepple gjots2 2.4.1 does not validate strings before launching the program specified by the BROWSER environment variable, which might allow remote attackers to conduct argument-injection attacks via a crafted URL.
